operating_ranges.evidence: Kanthal® AF Maximum Temperatures: RAC: 1,300°C (2,370°F), ROB: 1,300°C (2,370°F)
Kanthal® APM Maximum Temperatures: FIBROTHAL® MEANDER SYSTEM II: 1,350°C (2,460°F), FIBROTHAL® MEANDER SYSTEM III: 1,350°C (2,460°F)
Maximum Element Temperature: 1,150°C (2,100°F) for embedded systems
Cold resistance of 9.42 Ω for PAS 750/450/230 module
Hot resistance is approximately 4% higher, equal to 9.8 Ω
5,400 W at 230 V supply voltage for PAS 750/450/230
Converted to eurovoltage standard (400/230 V) in brochure

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Hot resistance is approximately 4% higher, equal to 9.8 Ω
iron oxide scale can damage Kanthal® heating elements, use a protective cover
Attacks all types of resistance alloys

fault_conditions.name: heating_element_failure
fault_conditions.evidence: After installation of the new heating element, follow the start-up instructions

fault_conditions.name: electrical_bridge_formation
fault_conditions.description: vapours form condensates from salts or oxides creating electrical bridges
fault_conditions.evidence: Vapours must not form condensates from salts or oxides, otherwise electrical bridges will be formed

fault_conditions.name: power_terminal_fracture
fault_conditions.description: stresses can fracture the lead at the element weld
fault_conditions.evidence: This action is necessary to preclude stresses can fracture the lead at the element weld

maintenance_actions.name: heating_element_replacement
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: heating element functionality and temperature control
maintenance_actions.evidence: Lift out the heating element, After installation of the new heating element, follow the start-up instructions

maintenance_actions.name: power_terminal_connection
maintenance_actions.evidence: Connect the bolts on the heating element. This must be done very carefully! Use two box-end wrenches when tightening the bolts

assumptions.statement: Temperature factor influencing heating resistance is negligible in power calculations
assumptions.reason: heating element alloy, Kanthal® A-1, results in a maximum resistance increase of only 4%

assumptions.statement: Modules can be operated at lower voltages for reduced power requirements
assumptions.reason: Modules can be operated at lower voltages if low power required
